title: Ocean Breakers
writer: Ivar Johansson, Henning Ohlson, Per Vedin
actors: Ingrid Bergman, Sten Lindgren, Tore Svennberg
plot: Daniel has been forced by his father to become a priest. After graduating, he comes to a parish in Hälsingland. During one stormy night, he seduces a young girl, Karin, and rapes her. Filled with regret, he runs out into the dark ...
